articles.title: Public School NY's Bespoke Boots Are Timbs at Their Toughest
articles.summary: SummaryTimberland’s "The Shed" crafted bespoke, all-black leather boots for Public School NY founders at the 2026 Met Gala.The custom design features exaggerated proportions, stacked midsoles, and distinct nickel-plated copper toe guards.“The Shed", Timberland's special workshop, crafted custom boots for the Public School New York founders, Dao-Yi Chow and Maxwell Osborne, as they attended the 2026 Met Gala. In addition to dressing the menswear content creator Wisdom Kaye in full Public School, Dao-Yi and Maxwell joined him on the Met steps, sporting the bespoke boots.In all black, aside from the metallic details, the leather boot fits neatly in the Public School NY street-meets-sleek aesthetic. The custom Public School NY pairs are composed of Wickett & Craig vegetable-tanned leather. In

articles.title: Zalando Cooks Up a Piping Hot Launch for New Balance ABZORB
articles.summary: Zalando is expanding its footwear library with the arrival of the New Balance ABZORB collection. To mark its launch, the retailer serves up a new campaign spotlighting the ABZORB 2000 and 2010 models. Known for its assortment of activations that turn playful concepts into inspiring style, Zalando centers the launch around the humble food truck. Drawing a parallel between the appetites of sneakerheads and foodies, the supporting campaign finds the silhouettes on an alternative menu as individuals queue up to get their hands on a pair. Not forgetting to incorporate a series of fresh fits, the visuals also feature a curation of New Balance garments. articles.title: ETRO x Globe-Trotter’s "Arnica" Luggage Collection Upgrades the Art of Transit
articles.summary: SummaryThe collaboration merges Etro’s iconic paisley jacquard with Globe-Trotter’s signature vulcanized fiberboard constructionThe release features classic carry-on and check-in sizes alongside a modern crossbody micro caseA special edition infused with mythic motifs by British illustrator Tabby Booth rounds out the exclusive lineupETRO and Globe-Trotter are elevating modern transit with the new "Arnica" Luggage Collection.At the core of the collection is Globe-Trotter’s signature vulcanized fiberboard shell, a material specifically engineered for high shock resistance and long-term durability. Pro skater Ishod Wair's signature silhouette is getting a moody, tonal update with the introduction of the Nike SB Air Max Ishod "Grand Purple." Blending rich aesthetics with skate-ready durability, the new colorway is built to make a bold statement both on and off the board.The design’s true character is derived from its expert use of color layering. articles.title: Reebok and ICECREAM Bring Back the Original Board Flip
articles.summary: SummaryReebok and ICECREAM have officially teamed up to re-release the Board Flip, a groundbreaking skate shoe initially launched in 2005 by Pharrell Williams and Billionaire Boys Club ICECREAMThe drop includes the return of the classic "Watermelon" colorway alongside the brand-new "Pink Lemonade" editionFollowing a BBC ICECREAM exclusive drop on May 1, the sneakers will see a wider global release on May 6, 2026 via ReebokHuge news for sneakerheads, skaters, and cultural archivists alike: the original luxury skate shoe is officially back. Reebok and ICECREAM have reunited to resurrect the Board Flip, a silhouette that marked a true turning point in the mainstream intersection of high fashion and skateboarding. articles.title: Fashion’s Favorite Climbing-Inspired Sneaker Has an American-Built Update
articles.summary: The KEEN Jasper KM Lite has arrived with an American build that's both responsibly made and lightweight by design. First introduced in 2008 as the brand’s climbing-inspired outdoor sneaker, the Jasper now has a refreshed look that delivers sleek style without compromising on comfort or quality. Most noticeably, the uppers have been smoothed with discreet stitching while the heel counter is satisfyingly streamlined into the midsole. It’s a subtle shift, but one that quietly ushers the Jasper from trail staple to a pair that’s just as at home in the city as it is off-grid.For men, the Jasper KM comes in three versatile colorways: Canteen/Black; Khaki/Birch; Black/Steel Grey, while for women, colorways include Granite Green/Black; Cameo Rose/Black; Plaza Taupe/Bitch; Brindle/Birch. articles.title: Nike SB Gives the Dunk Low "Muni Fast Pass" Split Color-Blocking
articles.summary: Name: Nike SB Dunk Low “Muni Fast Pass”Colorway: Lightning/Denim Turquoise-Iron Grey-Wolf GreySKU: IR1888-700MSRP: $130 USDRelease Date: Available nowWhere to Buy: NikeThe Nike SB Dunk Low "Muni Fast Pass" is officially here in a striking "Lightning" and "Denim Turquoise" colorway, offering a strict exercise in high-contrast color-blocking.The physical mechanics of this release are defined by its hyper-specific material distribution. The design executes a dramatic lengthwise split down the center of the silhouette. This structural choice sharply divides the bright teal and yellow sections, creating an asymmetrical visual across the shoe's upper.Anchoring the declarative two-tone base, the profile is highlighted by a reflective silver Nike Swoosh.
